2603.18571.title: CAPSUL: A Comprehensive Human Protein Benchmark for Subcellular Localization
2603.18571.paper_summary: Subcellular localization is a crucial biological task for drug target identification and function annotation. Although it has been biologically realized that subcellular localization is closely associated with protein structure, no existing dataset offers comprehensive 3D structural information with detailed subcellular localization annotations, thus severely hindering the application of promising structure-based models on this task. To address this gap, we introduce a new benchmark called $\mathbf{CAPSUL}$, a $\mathbf{C}$omprehensive hum$\mathbf{A}$n $\mathbf{P}$rotein benchmark for $\mathbf{SU}$bcellular $\mathbf{L}$ocalization. It features a dataset that integrates diverse 3D structural representations with fine-grained subcellular localization annotations carefully curated by domain experts. We evaluate this benchmark using a variety of state-of-the-art sequence-based and structure-based models, showcasing the importance of involving structural features in this task. Furthermore, we explore reweighting and single-label classification strategies to facilitate future investigation on structure-based methods for this task. Lastly, we showcase the powerful interpretability of structure-based methods through a case study on the Golgi apparatus, where we discover a decisive localization pattern $α$-helix from attention mechanisms, demonstrating the potential for bridging the gap with intuitive biological interpretability and paving the way for data-driven discoveries in cell biology.
2603.18571.paper_summary_zh: 亞細胞定位是藥物靶點識別和功能註釋中一項關鍵的生物學任務。雖然生物學上已經意識到亞細胞定位與蛋白質結構密切相關，但目前沒有現有數據集提供綜合的三維結構信息以及詳細的亞細胞定位註釋，因此嚴重阻礙了有前景的基於結構的模型在這項任務上的應用。為了解決這一空白，我們引入了一個新的基準，稱為 $\mathbf{CAPSUL}$，即 $\mathbf{C}$omprehensive hum$\mathbf{A}$n $\mathbf{P}$rotein benchmark for $\mathbf{SU}$bcellular $\mathbf{L}$ocalization。它的特點是整合了多樣的三維結構表徵，並由領域專家精心策劃了細粒度的亞細胞定位註釋。我們使用各種最先進的基於序列和基於結構的模型來評估這一基準，展示了在這項任務中涉及結構特徵的重要性。此外，我們探索了重加權和單標籤分類策略，以促進未來對這項任務的基於結構的方法的研究。最後，我們通過對高爾基體的案例研究展示了基於結構的方法的強大可解釋性，在這裡我們從注意力機制中發現了一個決定性的定位模式 $α$-螺旋，顯示了在直觀的生物學可解釋性與數據驅動的細胞生物學發現之間架起橋樑的潛力。
2603.18571.author: Yicheng Hu et.al.
2603.18571.authors: Yicheng Hu, Xinyu Lin, Shulin Li, Wenjie Wang, Fengbin Zhu, Fuli Feng
